title: Time Stop When Empty
description: This mod stops the time when the server is empty.
body:
![Day Counter banner](https://i.ibb.co/Bz3gSqx/banner.png)
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📝About:**
- This mod stops the time when the server is empty.
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- Supported Engine: FORGE, NEOFORGE
- Supported Game Versions: 1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21.1
- Automaticaly stops/starts the time when player leaves or joins.
  
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📜Our partner:**
![Partner](https://i.ibb.co/JqPjJKf/bisect-hosting2.png)
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **💡Ideas:**
- If you have an idea which makes the mod better then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#💡idea-suggestions** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **👾Bugs:**
- If you have found a bug then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#🧰bug-reports** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
